summary: Comprehensive testing of Wrestling School 'Headlock Headquarter' website completed. Backend APIs fully functional (100% success rate). Frontend mostly working with minor UI interaction issues in booking form.

ui_bugs.issue: Date picker button not clickable due to overlay interception
Dropdown options not selectable, timeout on click events

integration_issues.issue: Form submission blocked by required field validation due to UI interaction issues

passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero section and navigation
Navigation links scroll to correct sections
Admin login works with credentials admin/headlock2024
All API endpoints return correct status codes
Booking form fields accept input correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix booking form UI interaction issues: 1) Date picker overlay interception preventing clicks, 2) Experience level dropdown not responding to selections. Consider adding force=true to click events or adjusting z-index/modal handling.
